questions.question_text: Explain the difference between continuous delivery and continuous deployment.
questions.ideal_answer: Continuous delivery: code is always in deployable state, but deployment requires manual approval. Continuous deployment: every change that passes tests is automatically deployed to production.

questions.question_text: How would you design a highly available system across multiple regions?
questions.ideal_answer: Multi-region deployment, load balancing, database replication, CDN, health checks, failover mechanisms, disaster recovery plan, monitoring and alerting.
